title: Mauprat
summaries: "Mauprat" by George Sand is a historical novel published in 1837. Set in rural France before the Revolution, it tells the story of Bernard Mauprat, a young man raised among cruel, lawless relatives in a notorious family. When he encounters his refined cousin Edmée, her influence awakens his conscience and inspires him to transform himself. This tale of redemption explores whether love and education can overcome a savage upbringing, blending romance with philosophical questions about human nature and civilization.
